title: diagramkit configuration
description: Schema for diagramkit.config.json5 / .json / .diagramkitrc.json. Mirrors the DiagramkitConfig TypeScript interface shipped with the npm package.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference. Used by editors for autocomplete; ignored at runtime.

outputDir.description: Output folder name created next to source files (or used directly when sameFolder=false). Default: '.diagramkit'.

manifestFile.description: Manifest filename inside the output folder. Must not contain path separators. Default: 'manifest.json'.

useManifest.description: Whether to use the manifest for incremental builds. When false, every render re-renders all files. Default: true.

sameFolder.description: When true, write outputs in the same folder as the source file (no subfolder). Default: false.

defaultFormats.description: Default output formats. Used when --format is not specified. Default: ['svg'].

defaultTheme.description: Default theme variant(s) to render. Default: 'both'.

outputPrefix.description: Prefix prepended to output filenames (before the diagram name). Must not contain path separators. Default: ''.

outputSuffix.description: Suffix appended to output filenames (after the diagram name, before the theme suffix). Must not contain path separators. Default: ''.

extensionMap.description: Custom extension-to-DiagramType mapping. Merged on top of the built-in map. Keys must be lowercase extensions including the leading dot (e.g. '.puml').

inputDirs.description: Restrict scanning to these directories (relative to project root). Default: scan the entire tree.

overrides.description: Per-file render overrides keyed by exact filename, relative path, or glob pattern (e.g. 'docs/*.mermaid', '**/*.excalidraw').

mermaidLayout.description: Mermaid aspect-ratio rebalance options. Controls whether diagramkit measures the rendered SVG aspect ratio and warns or auto-rebalances flowcharts that fall outside the tolerance band. Only affects mermaid renders.

fileOverride.description: Per-file render overrides. All fields are optional and override the resolved defaults for matching files.

scale.description: Scale factor for raster output (0 < scale <= 10).

contrastOptimize.description: Disable dark SVG contrast optimization for matching files when set to false.

mode.description: Rebalance behaviour. 'off' disables measurement; 'warn' (default) only warns when the rendered SVG ratio is outside the tolerance band; 'flip' swaps flowchart direction (LR<->TB); 'elk' re-renders with the ELK layout engine and an aspectRatio hint; 'auto' tries flip first then ELK and keeps the closest result.

targetAspectRatio.description: Target aspect ratio (width / height). Used both as the picker target and as the `elk.aspectRatio` hint. Default: 4/3 ≈ 1.333.

tolerance.description: Tolerance factor — the rendered ratio is acceptable when inside [target/tolerance, target*tolerance]. Default: 2.5.
